jokes.text: Those cookies are fresh-a-licious, but they produce a lot of trash.
jokes.setup: Character commenting on cookies being fresh
jokes.punchline: The made-up word 'fresh-a-licious' combining fresh and delicious
jokes.explanation: Simple portmanteau word play, mildly amusing but not particularly clever

jokes.text: So? It's not the only one we've got.
jokes.setup: Being told the head spray is damaging the planet
jokes.punchline: Dismissive attitude that there are other planets to damage
jokes.explanation: Good character-driven environmental callousness, economical and quotable

jokes.text: Controversial? - Oh, my, no. For this highly controversial mission...
jokes.setup: Character asks if mission is controversial
jokes.punchline: Professor says no then immediately calls it highly controversial
jokes.explanation: Classic Professor Farnsworth contradiction, well-structured misdirection

jokes.text: Impossible. The tanker has 6000 hulls. So, unlike me, it's entirely leakproof.
jokes.setup: Professor assures the tanker can't leak due to multiple hulls
jokes.punchline: Self-deprecating admission that he himself leaks
jokes.explanation: Excellent character integration - Professor's age/incontinence perfectly woven into technical exposition

jokes.text: Protestors? - Correct. Six thousand hulls.
jokes.setup: Character asks about protestors
jokes.punchline: Professor responds about hulls instead, showing he's not listening
jokes.explanation: Mild confusion comedy, shows Professor's scattered attention

jokes.text: To avoid the tollbooth.
jokes.setup: Asked why they fly dangerously close to penguin preserve
jokes.punchline: Mundane reason of avoiding a tollbooth for space travel
jokes.explanation: Brilliant absurdist logic - applying mundane Earth concerns to dangerous space travel

jokes.text: She's restocked with emergency jam.
jokes.setup: Discussing ship preparations
jokes.punchline: Emergency jam as essential space equipment
jokes.explanation: Mildly absurd supply choice, economical delivery

jokes.text: This is my normal jacket. I've had it 1 0 years.
jokes.setup: Hermes demands captain's jacket be handed over
jokes.punchline: Leela reveals it's just her regular jacket
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Leela's practical nature vs ceremonial expectations

jokes.text: Well, Fry, or should I say Captain Fry? No, I shouldn't. Bender is the new captain.
jokes.setup: Hermes builds up to calling Fry captain
jokes.punchline: Immediately reverses and gives it to Bender instead
jokes.explanation: Well-structured misdirection, builds and deflates expectation efficiently

jokes.text: Being captain is about intuition and heart. A good captain can't have either.
jokes.setup: Explains qualities needed for captaincy
jokes.punchline: Contradicts himself that good captains need the opposite
jokes.explanation: Excellent paradoxical logic about leadership, highly quotable and subversive

jokes.text: I do think of human life as expendable.
jokes.setup: Being praised as logical and perfect for captain
jokes.punchline: Cheerfully confirms his callousness toward humans
jokes.explanation: Perfect Bender character moment - his casual misanthropy delivered matter-of-factly

jokes.text: She let me sit on her lap and steer, in this comic I drew.
jokes.setup: Fry complaining Leela was training him to be captain
jokes.punchline: His 'evidence' is a comic book he drew himself
jokes.explanation: Perfect Fry childishness - treating his own fantasy comic as documentary evidence

jokes.text: The new one's out!
jokes.setup: Fry mentions his comic
jokes.punchline: Amy's excited reaction treating it like a real publication
jokes.explanation: Nice character beat showing Amy's enthusiastic support of Fry's delusions

jokes.text: Now, look spry, men. We launch at six bells.
jokes.setup: Bender as new captain
jokes.punchline: Immediately adopting pompous naval terminology
jokes.explanation: Shows Bender getting into the captain role with traditional naval language, mildly amusing character moment.

jokes.text: When you clap your hands...you kill thousands of spores that'll someday form a nutritious fungus.
jokes.setup: Environmental activist asking for no applause
jokes.punchline: Extremely specific and absurd reason about spore death
jokes.explanation: Brilliantly absurd environmental extremism - takes conservation to ridiculous logical extreme

jokes.text: Just show your approval with a mold-friendly thumbs up.
jokes.setup: Can't clap due to spore concerns
jokes.punchline: Alternative approval method that's 'mold-friendly'
jokes.explanation: Excellent escalation of the absurd environmental logic, great wordplay with 'mold-friendly'

jokes.text: Please hold your thumbs until the end.
jokes.setup: Just suggested thumbs up as alternative
jokes.punchline: Immediately restricts even that simple gesture
jokes.explanation: Perfect escalation showing the character's excessive control, plays on 'hold your applause'

jokes.text: Why resort to nonviolence? Can't we kick their asses?
jokes.setup: Told about nonviolent protest
jokes.punchline: Leela immediately suggests violence instead
jokes.explanation: Great character moment showing Leela's direct, action-oriented approach conflicting with hippie philosophy

jokes.text: Little lady, those people's asses are living things too.
jokes.setup: Leela suggests kicking asses
jokes.punchline: Taking 'asses' literally as living beings to protect
jokes.explanation: Brilliant literal interpretation of colloquialism through extreme environmentalist lens

jokes.text: We're hitched up tighter than Davy Jones' U-Haul.
jokes.setup: Describing how securely they're attached to the tanker
jokes.punchline: Mixing nautical reference with modern moving truck company
jokes.explanation: Decent anachronistic wordplay mixing old sea lore with modern commerce

jokes.text: From now on, you'll be known as Wiggles.
jokes.setup: Bender wants to give Fry a nickname as first mate
jokes.punchline: Chooses the ridiculous and emasculating name 'Wiggles'
jokes.explanation: Good power dynamic humor showing Bender's petty authority abuse

jokes.text: What's Peter Parrot's first rule of captaining?
jokes.setup: Bender claiming to have read captain's handbook
jokes.punchline: Made-up nautical authority with silly parrot pun name
jokes.explanation: Mild pun on nautical authority figure, shows Bender's fake expertise

jokes.text: Our peace ring has them trapped like a tiger in a washing machine.
jokes.setup: Describing how their protest has trapped the ship
jokes.punchline: Bizarre and violent simile for a peaceful protester to use
jokes.explanation: Brilliantly absurd violent imagery from a pacifist character, memorable and quotable

jokes.text: Didn't you realize spaceships can move in three dimensions?
jokes.setup: Protestors surprised ship escaped their circle
jokes.punchline: Pointing out the obvious about 3D movement in space
jokes.explanation: Solid logical observation pointing out protesters' tactical oversight

jokes.text: No, I did not.
jokes.setup: Asked if he realized ships move in 3D
jokes.punchline: Admits complete ignorance with deadpan honesty
jokes.explanation: Perfect deadpan admission of tactical stupidity, economical delivery

jokes.text: If you're cold, rub your bodies with permafrost. It's nature's long johns.
jokes.setup: Giving advice about staying warm
jokes.punchline: Suggesting rubbing frozen ground for warmth plus 'nature's long johns'
jokes.explanation: Good absurdist survival advice with nice 'nature's X' construction

jokes.text: If rubbing dirt in your crotch is wrong, I don't wanna be right.
jokes.setup: Advice about rubbing permafrost on body
jokes.punchline: Zoidberg enthusiastically endorsing crotch-dirt rubbing
jokes.explanation: Perfect Zoidberg moment - takes advice to gross extreme with sincere enthusiasm

jokes.text: They're so cute, like if puppies and kittens could have babies.
jokes.setup: Looking at penguins
jokes.punchline: Impossible biological comparison combining two already cute animals
jokes.explanation: Sweet but biologically impossible comparison, fits Amy's character

jokes.text: It's this medal I'm most proud of. I won it for saving the children of Earth from a giant kangaroo.
jokes.setup: Zapp showing off medals
jokes.punchline: Ridiculous heroic claim about fighting giant kangaroo
jokes.explanation: Perfect Zapp braggadocio - absurd heroic claim delivered with complete seriousness

jokes.text: It was on Australian news. You didn't see it.
jokes.setup: Just claimed to fight giant kangaroo
jokes.punchline: Provides convenient excuse for why no one heard about it
jokes.explanation: Good escalation showing Zapp's prepared excuses for his lies

jokes.text: Those aren't even medals. They're bottle caps and pepperoni slices.
jokes.setup: Zapp showing off his 'medals'
jokes.punchline: Leela reveals they're just random food items and trash
jokes.explanation: Excellent visual gag reveal puncturing Zapp's pretensions with absurd specific details

jokes.text: Fine, I've got a toast. To Captain Bender. He's the best...at being a jerk, and his ugly face is as dumb as a butt.
jokes.setup: Forced to make a toast to Bender
jokes.punchline: Starts positive then delivers childish insults
jokes.explanation: Good misdirection toast with childish insults fitting Fry's character

jokes.text: I've heard better.
jokes.setup: Fry delivers elaborate insult
jokes.punchline: Bender's underwhelmed response to being called ugly and dumb
jokes.explanation: Perfect economy - Bender's casual dismissal of insults shows his confidence

jokes.text: Three.
jokes.setup: Zapp says ravioli only has two shoe prints
jokes.punchline: Kif matter-of-factly corrects it's even grosser
jokes.explanation: Perfect Kif moment - precise correction making bad situation worse

jokes.text: I once knew a guy... You look like him.
jokes.setup: Bender trying to be profound while drunk
jokes.punchline: Completely banal observation delivered seriously
jokes.explanation: Good drunk Bender rambling, anti-climactic revelation

jokes.text: He wasn't neither...
jokes.setup: Just said Kif looks like someone he knew
jokes.punchline: Immediately contradicts himself with drunk logic
jokes.explanation: Mild drunk rambling, shows Bender's intoxicated state

jokes.text: Bender's too low and upside down. - He must be talking on a cell phone.
jokes.setup: Ship is flying erratically
jokes.punchline: Assuming bad driving is due to cell phone use
jokes.explanation: Dated reference to cell phone driving concerns, mildly topical

jokes.text: Fools. If only they'd built it with 6001 hulls. When will they learn?
jokes.setup: Tanker crashes despite having 6000 hulls
jokes.punchline: Professor acts like one more hull would have made the difference
jokes.explanation: Excellent callback showing Professor's absurd engineering logic - one more hull as magic solution

jokes.text: I don 't think any of us can understand how those poor penguins feel.
jokes.setup: News anchor expressing sympathy for oil-covered penguins
jokes.punchline: Sets up visual gag of what follows
jokes.explanation: Setup line for visual gag, standard news sympathy

jokes.text: Oily humanoid.
jokes.setup: News anchor says no one can understand how penguins feel
jokes.punchline: Cut to penguin calling humans 'oily humanoid' in disgust
jokes.explanation: Brilliant reversal - penguin expressing same disgust toward humans that humans have toward oily animals

jokes.text: At the time of the crash, the captain had an alcohol level of. 08 percent...well below the legal limit for robots.
jokes.setup: Reporting on captain's sobriety during crash
jokes.punchline: Reveals robots have different, presumably higher, legal alcohol limits
jokes.explanation: Smart worldbuilding joke about robot alcohol tolerance, good misdirection

jokes.text: As your lawyer, I declare y'all are in a 1 2-piece bucket of trouble.
jokes.setup: Lawyer assessing legal situation
jokes.punchline: Mixing 'bucket of trouble' with KFC reference fitting his chicken nature
jokes.explanation: Perfect character integration - chicken lawyer using chicken-related expressions naturally

jokes.text: Five hours? Couldn't you have just gotten me the death penalty?
jokes.setup: Given community service sentence
jokes.punchline: Bender prefers execution to manual labor
jokes.explanation: Perfect Bender - his extreme laziness makes death preferable to work

jokes.text: I'd have done better, but it's hard pleading a case...while awaiting trial for incompetence.
jokes.setup: Apologizing for poor legal work
jokes.punchline: Admits he's literally on trial for being bad at his job
jokes.explanation: Excellent recursive incompetence joke - lawyer's excuse proves the charges against him

jokes.text: To avoid frostbite, put your hands between your buttocks. That's nature's pocket.
jokes.setup: Giving cold weather survival advice
jokes.punchline: Gross anatomical survival tip with 'nature's pocket' phrase
jokes.explanation: Good gross-out humor with memorable 'nature's pocket' phrase

jokes.text: Can't beat fresh-squeezed.
jokes.setup: Bender supposedly cleaning oil-covered penguins
jokes.punchline: Implies he's squeezing oil from penguins like fruit
jokes.explanation: Dark visual gag showing Bender's complete misunderstanding of his cleanup duty

jokes.text: Are they black with white feathers...or white with black feathers? - Don't matter. They're all beautiful.
jokes.setup: Fry asking about penguin coloring
jokes.punchline: Environmentalist's all-accepting response
jokes.explanation: Mild philosophical humor about perception and environmentalist acceptance

jokes.text: Man, he got away. This is why chief says no hugging.
jokes.setup: Bender escapes during interaction with penguins
jokes.punchline: Guard's matter-of-fact policy explanation about hugging
jokes.explanation: Excellent deadpan delivery of absurd prison policy, highly quotable

jokes.text: I'm gonna stay up singing songs about penguins in a fine, piercing tenor.
jokes.setup: End of workday activities
jokes.punchline: Oddly specific and annoying musical plan
jokes.explanation: Perfect character moment. The specificity of 'fine, piercing tenor' is both pretentious and annoying as intended.

jokes.text: Here robot, robot, robot.
jokes.setup: Looking for missing Bender
jokes.punchline: Calls for him like a pet animal
jokes.explanation: Simple but effective animal calling reference applied to robot

jokes.text: They sent us inside for doing an unsatisfactory job. - And eating penguin eggs. - You ate most of them.
jokes.setup: Explaining why they're not working
jokes.punchline: Reveals they were eating the animals they were supposed to help, then blame each other
jokes.explanation: Good escalation revealing their incompetence and callousness toward wildlife

jokes.text: Where's Captain Bender? Off catastrophizing some other planet?
jokes.setup: Looking for Bender
jokes.punchline: Made-up word 'catastrophizing' playing on his tendency to cause disasters
jokes.explanation: Clever wordplay creating 'catastrophizing' as verb for Bender's destructive nature

jokes.text: Such a man. I'd follow him to hell and back, I would.
jokes.setup: Fry taking command to rescue Bender
jokes.punchline: Kif's romantic admiration for Fry's leadership
jokes.explanation: Typical Kif hero worship, fits his character but not particularly original

jokes.text: What's this water made of, ice? Forget this!
jokes.setup: Bender encountering frozen water
jokes.punchline: Acts surprised that ice is made of water, immediately gives up
jokes.explanation: Perfect Bender laziness - acts outraged by basic physics as excuse to quit

jokes.text: I don't think we're on Pluto. We may have left space as we know it.
jokes.setup: Lost while searching for Bender
jokes.punchline: Dramatic overstatement about leaving known space
jokes.explanation: Mild absurdist escalation of being lost, fits Fry's tendency to dramatize

jokes.text: It's like a mix of penguin estrogen, penguin Viagra and Spanish penguin fly.
jokes.setup: Explaining dark matter's effect on penguins
jokes.punchline: Lists increasingly specific penguin-based aphrodisiacs
jokes.explanation: Good escalating list of absurdly specific penguin-based sexual enhancers

jokes.text: A garden-variety penguin lays one egg a year. Since the spill, our penguins lay six eggs every 1 5 minutes!
jokes.setup: Explaining normal penguin reproduction
jokes.punchline: Extreme acceleration of egg-laying to absurd frequency
jokes.explanation: Good statistical escalation showing absurd reproductive acceleration

jokes.text: Also, the eggs hatch in only 1 2 hours! Also, the males are laying eggs!
jokes.setup: Already explained rapid egg laying
jokes.punchline: Adds rapid hatching then biological impossibility of male egg laying
jokes.explanation: Excellent escalation ending with biological impossibility for maximum absurdity

jokes.text: This man has overgasped!
jokes.setup: Someone reacting with shock to the penguin news
jokes.punchline: Made-up term for excessive gasping reaction
jokes.explanation: Clever invented word for excessive shock reaction, mildly amusing

jokes.text: If only we hadn't flown penguins to Pluto and dumped oil on them.
jokes.setup: Discussing penguin overpopulation crisis
jokes.punchline: Sarcastically summarizes their obviously bad decisions
jokes.explanation: Good sarcastic observation about their series of obviously terrible choices

jokes.text: Oh, God, it's inhuman! It's like Hong Kong! I'll do it!
jokes.setup: Being convinced penguin hunting is necessary
jokes.punchline: Compares penguin overpopulation to Hong Kong's density then agrees to hunt
jokes.explanation: Decent geographic comparison joke, shows Leela's reluctant acceptance

jokes.text: Sorry, if it's fun in any way, it's not environmentalism.
jokes.setup: Told environmentalists are enjoying penguin hunting
jokes.punchline: Rigid rule that environmentalism must be joyless
jokes.explanation: Brilliant satirical observation about environmental movement's self-serious nature, highly quotable

jokes.text: Really? How about blowing up dams? - Yeah, that is fun.
jokes.setup: Rule that environmentalism can't be fun
jokes.punchline: Admits destructive environmental action is actually enjoyable
jokes.explanation: Excellent immediate contradiction showing hypocrisy about environmental activism

jokes.text: Don't leave orphans. Gotta kill entire families.
jokes.setup: Hunting penguins for their own good
jokes.punchline: Extremely dark tactical advice about efficient killing
jokes.explanation: Very dark humor showing how 'merciful' killing becomes systematic genocide

jokes.text: They're so cute. No! You can do this. It's like murdering a little butler.
jokes.setup: Leela trying to psyche herself up to shoot penguins
jokes.punchline: Compares it to murdering a butler to make it seem easier
jokes.explanation: Brilliant dark comedy - trying to make murder easier by thinking of penguins as servants

jokes.text: I don't know why, but when I look at their faces...it makes me want to puke! In a good way.
jokes.setup: Bender denying he loves the penguins
jokes.punchline: Admits they make him feel nauseous but qualifies it positively
jokes.explanation: Perfect Bender emotional confusion - can't process positive feelings normally

jokes.text: I don't know why, but when I look at their faces... it makes me want to puke! In a good way.
jokes.setup: Bender's reaction to penguins
jokes.punchline: Positive feeling expressed through nausea
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Bender's inability to express positive emotions normally. The qualification 'in a good way' is perfect.

jokes.text: You may just be farming some free-range truth there.
jokes.setup: Leela making point about hunting ethics
jokes.punchline: Environmentalist agreement using organic farming metaphor
jokes.explanation: Clever organic/natural metaphor for recognizing truth, fits character perfectly

jokes.text: I taught them if it ain't black and white, peck and bite.
jokes.setup: Penguins attacking humans
jokes.punchline: Bender's rhyming combat advice based on penguin coloring
jokes.explanation: Excellent rhyming combat philosophy that's both clever and explains penguin aggression

jokes.text: Guys, it's me, your lovable dictator!
jokes.setup: Bender trying to call off attacking penguins
jokes.punchline: Describes himself as lovable dictator, contradictory terms
jokes.explanation: Good oxymoron showing Bender's skewed self-perception as benevolent tyrant

jokes.text: If only we had a toboggan!
jokes.setup: Being chased by angry penguins
jokes.punchline: Wishes for recreational winter equipment in life-threatening situation
jokes.explanation: Mild absurdist priority confusion in dangerous situation

jokes.text: Right, they can swim. It's all coming back to me now.
jokes.setup: Penguins following them into water
jokes.punchline: Fry 'remembering' basic penguin biology too late
jokes.explanation: Good Fry stupidity moment - forgetting obvious animal facts at crucial moment

jokes.text: At least it'll help reduce their population. Yeah, life is hilariously cruel.
jokes.setup: Penguins eating Fry and Leela
jokes.punchline: Finding silver lining in their own deaths, then philosophical observation
jokes.explanation: Excellent dark humor finding environmental benefit in their own demise

jokes.text: Nature will work itself out. It can't screw up any worse than we did, right?
jokes.setup: Asked if they helped the penguins
jokes.punchline: Admits they made everything worse while expressing false confidence
jokes.explanation: Good environmental message about human interference, slightly predictable

jokes.text: Thanks to my influence, those stupid birds will do just fine.
jokes.setup: Discussion about whether they helped penguins
jokes.punchline: Bender taking credit despite causing chaos
jokes.explanation: Typical Bender delusion taking credit for chaos, fits character but predictable
